text: figurine made of crystal and metal. Colour: white. Style: modern, elegant, floral, sculptural. Three exquisite decorative sculptures featuring delicate, multi-faceted white crystal blossoms perched gracefully atop slender polished gold stems. Each piece is anchored by a sleek, dark base, presenting a harmonious blend of refined sparkle and contemporary elegance perfect for sophisticated interiors.

bookend made of stone and brass. Colour: gold. Style: natural, geological, luxurious, elegant. These exquisite bookends feature polished gold-toned brass bases, cradling striking natural agate geode slices. Each geode reveals a unique crystalline interior in shades of grey and white, framed by earthy browns. A sophisticated blend of natural beauty and refined craftsmanship, perfect for elevating any bookshelf or study.

wall decor made of metal and stone. Colour: gold. Style: abstract, contemporary, glamorous, celestial. A captivating wall sculpture featuring a radiating gold metal sunburst design, gracefully fanning outwards. At its heart lies a striking deep blue natural stone with a polished finish, creating a luxurious focal point. This piece masterfully blends contemporary elegance with abstract charm, making it a sophisticated addition to any upscale interior.

mountain sculpture made of stone and metal. Colour: green. Style: nature-inspired, contemporary, serene, artisanal, desktop decor. A captivating green and brown variegated stone sculpture, meticulously carved to evoke a majestic mountain range, sits elegantly on a polished golden metal tray. The natural stone features a rugged, textured surface on its peak, contrasting with smoother sides. Accompanied by a sleek dark glass dropper bottle, this piece serves as a serene and sophisticated aromatic diffuser or an exquisite decorative accent for any luxury space.

sculptural form made of rattan . Colour: gold. Style: Organic, Modern, Abstract, Minimalist, Natural. This exquisite decorative piece presents a captivating arrangement of numerous slender, gracefully curved golden rods emanating outwards. Its organic, fan-like silhouette evokes a sense of movement and natural elegance, making it an ideal accent for a sophisticated modern interior.

figurine made of metal and marble. Colour: gold. Style: antique, figurative, ornate. This exquisite gilded frog figurine, with its intricately textured body and captivating emerald-green eyes, sits regally upon a distinguished rectangular plinth of polished green marble. A delicate chain adds an intriguing detail, enhancing the piece's antique charm and luxurious appeal, making it a perfect statement of refined taste for any discerning collector.

Bowl made of Silver and Amethyst. Colour: Silver. Style: Luxury, Gemstone, Ethereal, Decorative, Unique. A beautifully crafted miniature silver-toned bowl, brimming with raw, vibrant amethyst crystals. Adorned with a delicate chain and an intricately designed leaf accent, this piece exudes an ethereal charm. Perfect as a unique decorative object or a precious personal adornment, it captures a sense of sophisticated mystique.

decorative sculpture made of marble and malachite. Colour: green. Style: luxury, botanical, natural, elegant. This exquisite decorative sculpture features a polished green and white variegated marble base, providing a sophisticated foundation. A gleaming gold-toned, lemon-shaped vessel, adorned with a delicate gold leaf, overflows with raw, vibrant green malachite crystals. A fine chain gracefully extends from the golden leaf, adding an intriguing detail to this elegant, nature-inspired piece.

wall decor made of metal and stone. Colour: gold. Style: modern, abstract, luxury, sunburst, wall art. An exquisite sunburst wall sculpture features slender, radiant gold-toned metal rays emanating from a captivating central element. At its heart lies a richly textured, deep blue geode or stone, offering a striking contrast and organic beauty. This statement piece combines modern artistry with luxurious materials, perfect for elevating any sophisticated interior.

bookend made of crystal . Colour: green. Style: natural, raw-edge, organic, mineral, sculptural. Crafted from raw, unpolished green crystal, this striking pair of bookends brings a touch of natural grandeur to any discerning library or study. Each piece boasts an organic, textured surface that highlights the unique crystalline structure and vibrant hues, creating a captivating display. Functionally elegant, they provide sturdy support while serving as sculptural art.

bookend made of crystal . Colour: green. Style: natural, raw crystal, organic, earthy. Crafted from raw, natural green crystal, these exquisite bookends feature an unpolished, textured surface that highlights the inherent beauty of the stone. Each piece showcases unique crystalline formations, creating a striking and sophisticated accent for any luxury bookshelf or display. Their organic form brings a touch of nature's elegance into an elevated interior.

bookend made of crystal . Colour: green. Style: natural, raw, mineral, decorative, organic. These stunning bookends are carved from raw, natural green crystal, showcasing an exquisite interplay of light and shadow within their fractured surfaces. Each piece reveals unique striations and varying shades of emerald and teal, celebrating the unrefined beauty of the mineral. They provide a sophisticated and grounding presence, perfect for adorning a luxurious bookshelf or desk.

bookend made of stone and marble. Colour: green. Style: luxury, natural, modern, elegant, decorative. These luxurious bookends showcase exquisite, polished green agate slices, beautifully outlined with a delicate gold-gilded edge. Each unique stone is mounted on a sleek, pristine white marble base, creating a refined accessory that infuses natural grandeur and contemporary elegance into any sophisticated space.

decorative object made of marble and metal. Colour: white. Style: luxury, modern, minimalist, sculptural, natural elements. These elegant decorative objects feature polished white marble block bases, each topped with a delicate gold-toned vessel. Nestled within the vessels are striking raw blue-grey crystals, adding a touch of natural texture and subtle color. Perfect as sophisticated accents for a desk or shelf, embodying refined luxury and modern design.

crystal cluster made of crystal and acrylic. Colour: smoky brown. Style: natural, organic, decorative. A collection of exquisite natural crystal clusters, showcasing a range from rich smoky brown to ethereal translucent white hues. Each formation is meticulously detailed with naturally occurring facets, capturing and refracting light to create a mesmerizing display. These organic sculptures, presented on elegant minimalist stands, serve as captivating decorative accents, bringing a touch of raw geological beauty to any luxurious interior.

Bookend made of Acrylic and Stone. Colour: Clear. Style: Modern, Elegant, Crystal, Starburst, Luxury. A sophisticated pair of bookends crafted from clear, polished acrylic, each featuring a captivating spiky starburst cluster. These smoky brown crystal formations are elegantly mounted on subtle gold-tone stands, creating a luxurious and modern accent for any curated library or study.

Bookend made of Acrylic and Smoky Quartz. Colour: Transparent. Style: Modern, Luxury, Crystal Accented, Geometric, Glam. A pair of exquisite clear acrylic bookends, each featuring a captivating starburst cluster of smoky quartz atop a slender gold-toned base. The polished transparency of the bookends beautifully showcases the natural, textured allure of the crystals, creating a sophisticated and luxurious accessory for any discerning library or office.

bookend made of marble and crystal. Colour: white. Style: luxury, natural, modern glam, elegant. These exquisite bookends feature substantial polished white marble bases, grounding a dazzling cluster of natural clear crystals. Each crystal formation is elegantly secured by a lustrous gold-toned accent, creating a sophisticated blend of natural beauty and modern luxury. Perfect for adding a touch of opulent style to any study or living space.

sculpture made of marble and crystal. Colour: black. Style: luxury, modern, abstract, decorative, natural. A sophisticated trio of decorative sculptures, each featuring an organic cluster of dark brown crystal points emerging from a sleek, polished black marble cube. The contrasting textures of the raw crystal and the smooth, reflective marble create a striking visual interplay. These elegant pieces serve as a testament to natural beauty refined through minimalist design, perfect for elevating any luxury interior.

Decorative Sculpture made of Marble and Crystal. Colour: Black. Style: Luxury, Modern, Naturalist, Geometric, Elegant. Three striking decorative sculptures, each showcasing a vibrant cluster of smoky brown crystals emerging from a meticulously polished black marble plinth. These luxurious accents seamlessly blend raw geological beauty with sleek, modern design, creating captivating focal points for any sophisticated interior. The veining in the marble adds a touch of unique artistry to each piece.

Sculpture made of Marble and Crystal. Colour: Black. Style: Modern, Luxury, Mineral art, Decorative. These exquisite decorative sculptures feature lustrous dark bases topped with captivating crystal formations. Crafted from polished black marble, each base provides a sleek foundation for the dynamic clusters of bronze-hued crystals, showcasing their natural, multifaceted beauty. Their contemporary design and luxurious materials make them perfect accents for a sophisticated living space, adding an element of natural elegance and modern grandeur.

Tower made of Crystal and Metal. Colour: White. Style: Modern, Minimalist, Elegant, Luxury, Decorative. An exquisite decorative tower features a tall, slender crystal in luminous white, exuding serene elegance. It is gracefully mounted on a sleek gold-toned metal rod, firmly set into a pristine clear acrylic base. This sculptural piece brings a touch of modern luxury and tranquil beauty to any discerning space.
